title: Nexillumi 10M LED Strip Lights, Smart Bluetooth Light Strips with App & Remote, Colour Changing LED Tape Lights, Music Sync Dimmable RGB Lighting for Bedroom, Living Room, Kitchen, Ceiling & Party
features: Smart App & Remote Control LED Strip Lights: These 10M RGB LED strip lights support Bluetooth app and remote control, allowing you to customise colours, brightness and lighting modes instantly. Perfect LED lights for bedroom, gaming room and living room decoration.

Music Sync LED Lights for Bedroom & Parties: Built-in sound sensor makes these LED strip lights change colour with music and sound. Ideal for home cinema, gaming setups and party lighting — creating immersive ambience in any room.

Timer & Dimmable LED Tape Lights: Set automatic on/off schedules and adjust brightness to suit different moods and activities. These LED tape lights deliver comfortable lighting for sleep, study, work or entertaining.

Flexible, Cuttable & Easy Install LED Lights for Ceiling: Featuring strong self-adhesive backing, these flexible LED lights for ceiling, walls, stairs or under cabinets can be trimmed to fit your space perfectly — quick, clean and tool-free installation.

Decorative LED Strip Lights for Home & Celebrations: Perfect LED strip lights for bedroom, living room, kitchen and more. Add vibrant colour for Christmas, New Year, birthdays, parties and seasonal décor.

specifications_table.Fixture Features: App & Remote Control, Music Sync, Timer, Dimmable, Flexible
